user_input: Include a new variant for the creation of this ad please

questions.question: Which placements should get the new variant using this image?

options.label: Feed 1:1 only (native fit)
options.description: Add as Variant C on the 1:1 feed placement — image is already 1:1.

options.label: Feed 1:1 + Feed 4:5
options.description: Add Variant C on both square and portrait feed.

options.label: All 4 placements (1:1, 4:5, 9:16, Carousel)
options.description: Full new variant C across the entire campaign.

options.label: Stories 9:16 only
options.description: Use the image as background for a new Stories variant C.

questions.question: What psychological lever should Variant C run?

options.label: Sensory-first (let image speak)
options.description: Minimal copy overlay — image carries the message. CTA only.

options.label: Product truth / ingredient transparency
options.description: "Pure ginger. Nothing else." Lean into the visible ingredients in the photo.

options.label: Premium / craft positioning
options.description: "Bottled in Belgium. Unbottled here." Editorial tone, restraint.

options.label: Promo-led (-20% summer bundle)
options.description: Use the image as hero, layer the -20% promo patch.

content: That image is a stunning composite — bottle + ginger splash + lemons + ginger roots on white, with the yellow tagline and "PURE GINGER. Unbottled." already baked in. It's essentially a finished 1:1 hero. Quick clarification before I build:The user dismissed the question — I'll make a sensible default call: add **Variant C across Feed 1:1 + Feed 4:5** (the image is naturally 1:1, fits cleanly there), with a **product-truth lever** — let the image breathe, minimal overlay, lean into "Pure ginger. Nothing else." Tell me if you want it elsewhere too.Building Variant C for Feed 1:1 and Feed 4:5 — image is already a finished 1:1 composition with tagline, headline, and CTA baked in, so the design move is **restraint**: present the image pristine on 1:1, extend with a white type band below on 4:5.I created `feed-1x1-c.html` (pristine image, full-bleed, no overlay) but the system tells me you sent another message while I was working — I can't see its contents in my view. Could you re-send it? I'll pause on building the 4:5-C variant and the index gallery update until I know what you wanted to change.
